title: Build a calendar app in AI Studio in 6 minutes
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates building a no-code calendar application using Google AI Studio and Gemini to extract travel itineraries and convert them into calendar invitations. The tutorial showcases advanced reasoning capabilities for error troubleshooting and customization.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech tutorial builds a no-code calendar application in Google AI Studio, using Gemini to extract travel itineraries and convert them into calendar invitations. It demonstrates how Gemini's reasoning handles error troubleshooting and customization during the build. The takeaways: code generation drives the app assembly, and the model's troubleshooting capabilities address errors that surface along the way, all within a roughly six-minute walkthrough.
